steps.t: The Morgul Vale lies on the north-eastern border of South Ithilien. You should patrol the entrance to the Morgul Vale to see if the time is right to e…
The cross-roads lie on the northern border of South Ithilien. You should patrol the cross-roads.
Osgiliath lies on the north-west border of South Ithilien. You should patrol the entrance of Osgiliath to see if the time is right to enter the ancien…
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should speak with Arodor at Faramir's Look-out.
Osgiliath lies on the north-west border of South Ithilien. You should find the southern crack into Osgiliath.
The culverts lie underneath the city of Osiliath. You should search for an entrance to the underground tunnels.
The culverts lie underneath the city of Osgiliath. You should search for a Ranger base in the tunnels under Osgiliath.
